## Summary

Describe the compatibility problem and the smallest change that addresses it.

- GFN version:
- macOS version and architecture:
- physical controller VID:PID:

## Safety checklist

- [ ] `make check` passes.
- [ ] Unknown instruction sequences still fail closed.
- [ ] The official GFN app is never modified in place.
- [ ] No proprietary binaries or unsanitized logs are included.
- [ ] User-visible limitations and `CHANGELOG.md` are updated.
